data.name: Hentai World Farm
data.detailed_description:
Dive into a relaxing and enchanting puzzle journey where each completed stage unveils mesmerizing images of beautiful girls. Let the gentle background music create a calm atmosphere as you swap and arrange tiles with care, revealing each picture piece by piece.

Play at your own pace with no time limits, enjoying the rewarding sense of progress as puzzles grow more challenging. Whether you’re a casual player or a devoted puzzle fan, this game blends charm, relaxation, and captivating imagery.

Features:

Unlock stunning and alluring girl images at every level.

Enjoy soothing background music that enhances the mood.

View completed images in full-screen mode.

Experience a steady increase in puzzle difficulty.

No time pressure—play, relax, and savor the moment.

data.short_description: Relax in a soothing puzzle adventure where each level reveals captivating images of beautiful girls. Swap tiles, enjoy calming music, and progress at your own pace through increasingly rewarding challenges.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 保加利亞文*, 捷克文*, 丹麥文*, 匈牙利文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 泰文*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows XP, Vista, 7, 8, or 10
  • 處理器: 3.4 GHz Dual Core Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 1 GB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
